ratings.comment: She's amazing! Super passionate about what she does and what she's teaching, and she definitely wants what's best for her students. Assignments weren't too difficult and were applicable.

Prof. Pac cares so much about the content she teachers and it shows in her lectures. She is truly an expert in her field and I learned so much from her. I respect her an incredible amount, and she respects her students in turn. Everything we learned had a clear application outside of class. Anyone interested in SW should take her classes.
